sentiment.reasoning: An 18% margin improvement indicates significant operational efficiency gains that directly boost profitability.

sentiment.reasoning: Strong regional demand and an increased outlook signal positive momentum and improved future financial performance.

headlines.headline: Zrovex Industries faces regulatory review of renewable storage practices

sentiment.reasoning: A regulatory review introduces uncertainty and potential operational constraints regarding core business practices.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
